title: Subway Surfers
notes:
- Get your Crew together and ride through paradise in the new Bali update! Explore tropical jungles, golden temples and glowing sunsets.
- Join the Green Game Jam with the Rainforest Alliance Bundle and make a positive impact on our environment.
- Live loud and celebrate Pride Month with colorful events and rewards.
- Discover new Boards, Outfits and Characters like Golden Guardian and Lestari, inspired by island vibes.

title: PUBG MOBILE
notes:
The first ancient Greek myth-themed version, Hero's Crown is here! Conquer the four temple areas, complete five glorious trials, and recruit the centaur ally to fight alongside you!

Battle Royale
1. New Themed Mode: Four Mysterious Areas × Five New Trials → Challenge and recruit the centaur ally, and conquer the Crown's Abode.
2. Returning Themed Mode: Dinoground is back after three years!
3. Classic Mode: The 2-seater convertible Roadster is here with turbocharged speed.
New Collaborations

title: Among Us!
notes:
OUR ANIMATED SHOW IS FINALLY HERE!

Update to v17.4.0 and celebrate the Among Us Animated Show with a new Cosmicube and decorations from it placed around The Skeld. You can watch the show on Paramount+.

New Showbiz Cosmicube for 4000 Beans.
New Cosmic Cosmicube for 70 Stars.
Celebrate 8 years of Among Us on June 15th with a present from us to you.

And don't forget to check out all the news on our brand new game, Among Us Story: On Guard!

Read about it all at innersloth.com.

title: Sunday City: Life Simulator
notes:

- Trophies: show off special awards in your apartment.
